62.code: for (q = head->next; q != NULL; q = q->next) {
62.reason: The inner loop should start from head, not head->next, to ensure all pairs are compared. Also, the comparison condition p->exp < q->exp is incorrect for descending order; it should be p->exp < q->exp to swap when p's exponent is smaller, but the logic is flawed because p and q are not properly paired for bubble sort.
